headline: Fox is buying Roku
summary: Fox announced its acquisition of Roku for $22 billion. The deal combines Fox's networks and Tubi with Roku's devices and software. This merger aims to create a major streaming competitor.

headline: All the gear a 20-year gadget blogging veteran packs when traveling
summary: A veteran gadget blogger shares their refined travel packing list. The list evolved over two decades of travel and experimentation. Optimizing gear is crucial for a smooth trip, the author notes.

headline: Honor’s Magic V6 sets three foldable firsts
summary: Honor's Magic V6 foldable phone claims three world firsts: thinnest, biggest battery, and best water-resistance. Reviewers found only the larger battery truly felt like a significant upgrade. Other improvements were deemed only marginally superior to previous models.

headline: Under-16 social media ban announced by UK government
summary: The UK government announced a ban on social media for children under 16. The ban, mirroring Australia's, could begin early next year. It also includes measures against children talking to strangers in games and livestreaming.

headline: Fortnite Fans Are Obsessing Over Its New Pokémon-Like Sprite Creature Collecting
summary: Fortnite players are fixated on collecting new Pokémon-like 'Sprite' creatures. Rare species of these in-game Sprites are being sold for real money on eBay. The new feature has sparked a collecting craze among fans.

headline: How to clear your gaming backlog before GTA 6 with GeForce NOW
summary: Learn to conquer your gaming backlog before GTA 6 launches in November. Nvidia GeForce NOW streaming helps avoid lengthy downloads. Stream games instantly to maximize playtime and clear your list efficiently.

headline: The Office Star Rainn Wilson Says The Series is Too 'Politically Incorrect' to Be Made Today and He Does 'Kind of Miss That'
summary: Rainn Wilson, known as Dwight Schrute, believes 'The Office' is too 'politically incorrect' for modern production. He stated it would be 'too hard' to create the show today. Wilson admitted he 'kind of misses' that style of humor.

headline: Under-16s to Be Banned From Social Media, UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Says
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced plans to ban social media for under-16s. The government aims to pass regulation by Christmas. The ban is projected to take effect by spring 2027.

headline: How will social media ban work and when does it start?
summary: The UK government is implementing a social media ban for under-16s. Apps like TikTok and Snapchat will be prohibited for UK teens. The new measures are expected to start in early 2027.

headline: The US and Iran have agreed a deal. How soon could the economy go back to normal?
summary: The US and Iran have reached a new agreement. Experts warn the global economy will continue feeling war impacts for months. A swift return to pre-war economic conditions is unlikely.

headline: Two men found guilty over Starmer-linked arson attacks
summary: Two men have been found guilty of arson attacks. Property and a car connected to Prime Minister Keir Starmer were targeted. The incidents occurred last year.

headline: OnlyFans 'agents' control and threaten creators while taking half their earnings, BBC finds
summary: A BBC investigation found OnlyFans creators are exploited by 'agents.' Managers reportedly control and threaten creators, seizing up to half their earnings. Dozens of women described experiencing this exploitation.
